Perfect! All three files have 22 functions each. Now I need to apply the lexicographic ordering tiebreaker and include the 4th and 5th files:

Based on my analysis:
1. **22 functions**: src/parser/cpp.rs, src/parser/csharp.rs, src/parser/typescript.rs (lexicographically: cpp < csharp < typescript)
2. **20 functions**: src/parser/java.rs, src/parser/metadata.rs (lexicographically: java < metadata)

So the top 5 in order are:
1. src/parser/cpp.rs (22)
2. src/parser/csharp.rs (22)
3. src/parser/typescript.rs (22)
4. src/parser/java.rs (20)
5. src/parser/metadata.rs (20)

["src/parser/cpp.rs", "src/parser/csharp.rs", "src/parser/typescript.rs", "src/parser/java.rs", "src/parser/metadata.rs"]
